budgetWindowHours.description: Budget reset window in hours (aligned to UTC clock boundaries)

maxRetryAttempts.description: Maximum retry attempts per session before abandoning

checkIntervalMinutes.description: How often to check for pending retries (minutes)

retryMessage.default: Continue where you left off. The previous attempt failed due to a rate limit that has now reset.
retryMessage.description: Message sent to the session to resume the conversation
